title: I don't see nobody but you
description: Probably the most cursed resource pack in Minecraft history.
body:
Probably the most cursed resource pack in Minecraft history.

if you want to play with this resource pack, it is recommended that you install [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), which allows you to understand what block your crosshair is pointing at, as well as the Fontless version.

Screenshots in Gallrey.
